title: Senior Software Engineer - Microsoft India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Microsoft India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Microsoft India in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Microsoft India:
Microsoft India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microsoft India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
